caption:
Christmas treats at Sourdough Sophia Bakery 🎄✨

Featuring the Baileys Bow 🎀, classic German Lebkuchen ⭐️, Pistachio Cruffin 🥐, Carrot Cake with toasted pecans, brownies 🍫, mince pies and more 🍰☕

Always nice to be back for some of the most delicious pastries in the cosiest atmosphere ✨ @sourdoughsophia 

📍 Sourdough Sophia Hampstead, 14 Perrin’s Ct, NW3 1QS

(Press)
